assertions.reason: Repo-wide `npx prettier --check .` still exits 1. The previous `.factory/services.yaml` YAML syntax failure is gone, but Prettier now reports three unformatted flow JSON files: `.factory/validation/hardening/user-testing/flows/hardening-live-browser.json`, `.factory/validation/hardening/user-testing/flows/hardening-shell.json`, and `.factory/validation/hardening/user-testing/flows/hardening-vitest.json`.
The repo's actual lint gate remains `npx prettier --check .`, and that gate still exits 1 on the same three unformatted flow JSON files, so the end-to-end lint gate has not yet recovered.

commandsRun.observed: Checking formatting reported warnings for `hardening-live-browser.json`, `hardening-shell.json`, and `hardening-vitest.json`; `.factory/services.yaml` was not reported in the rerun.

artifacts.description: Captured stdout/stderr and exit code from the repo-wide Prettier rerun for VAL-CI-001 and VAL-CI-002.
